description: Title/type overrides for Mechacomic (Amutus / めちゃコミック). Keys are `${series}|${kind}` as emitted from スマートフォン明細/アプリ明細 detail sheets.

結婚商売[完全版]|巻.note: '結婚商売[完全版]' is sold as 巻 but GT classifies it as WT (not EB). Likely because it's a re-edit of a WT series that itself still exists; no 分冊版 form.

融点～とけあい～【完全版】|巻.note: This 巻 row uses EP (not EB) because GT treats '完全版' of a WT sibling as the episode-packed edition, while '完全版【特装版】' takes the EB slot.

title_normalization.description: No title mapping required for Mechacomic — raw シリーズ名 already matches GT channel_title_jp / title_jp 1:1 for all 107 rows in 202604.
